title: Notification No.113/2015-Cus(NT), dated 24.11.2015
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance Department of Revenue (Central Board of Excise and Customs) Notification No. 113/2015-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, the 24th November, 2015 S.O. (E). -In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and Sub-section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Principal Commissioner of Customs, Nhava Sheva-I, JNCH to act as a Common Adjudicating Authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on- (i) the Principal Commissioner of Customs, Nhava Sheva-I Commissionerate, Mumbai Customs Zone-II, Jawaharlal Nehru Customs House, Nhava Sheva, Uran, Dist.-Raigad- 400707; (ii) the Assistant/Deputy Commissioner of Customs, O/o the Principal Commissioner of Customs, Air Cargo Complex, Sahar, Andheri(East) Mumbai-400099, for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to show cause notice pertaining to M/s Gem Corpochem Private Limited, No. 39/41, Ashok Chambers, 3rd Floor, Devji Ratanshi Marg, Masjid (E), Mumbai- 400099 and others issued vide Show Cause Notice number DRI/CZU/VIII/48/ENQ-I/INT. 34/2014, dated the 18th February,2015 by the Additional Director General, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Chennai Zonal Unit, Chennai. [F No.437/31/2015-Cus.IV] (Z. R.Kamili) Director (Customs) -- 1 of 1 --
